case_title: MERCURY INSURANCE GROUP, A CORP. vs. MAHONEY, FLORENTZ JOHN et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-06-1996, CONTINUED TO APR-02-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 CONTINUED FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT. (IN THE FUTURE ALL CONTINUANCES MUST BE DONE BY "EX PARTE DECLARATION AND ORDER" WITH A $14.00 FILING FEE, UNLESS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN ORDER) NOTICE SENT BY COURT
